queries.question: which building and area have the cheapest room with a spa?
queries.sql: select Building, Area from Rooms where Spa = 1 order by Rate limit 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?building ?area WHERE {
  ?rooms a :Rooms .
  ?rooms p:Building ?building .
  ?rooms p:Area ?area .
  ?rooms p:Spa ?spa_f .
  ?rooms p:Rate ?rate_o .
  FILTER((STR(?spa_f) = "1" || STR(?spa_f) = "1.0"))
}
ORDER BY ASC(?rate_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Show the locations of occupied rooms.
queries.sql: select Building from Rooms where occupied = 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?building WHERE {
  ?rooms a :Rooms .
  ?rooms p:Building ?building .
  ?rooms p:Occupied ?occupied_f .
  FILTER((STR(?occupied_f) = "1" || STR(?occupied_f) = "1.0"))
}
